expectations.text: All feature slugs have at most 3 hyphenated segments
No feature description lists 3+ comma-separated parallel components

expectations.evidence: Out of range: channel-distribution-controller (15w), performance-analytics-engine (18w), gtm-path-engine (17w), bilingual-content-renderer (15w), brand-voice-governor (19w), abm-campaign-orchestrator (14w), thought-leadership-framework (13w)
